narrative:
Aberdeen Village (precinct in Brown County) has 945 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
